title: [codereview] Rust METRICS JSON lacks full packet_hashes lists
description: Rust hetero_node METRICS output only reports len() of packet_hashes_sent/received. Python NodeMetrics.to_dict() includes sorted lists of all hashes. This reduces utility for interop analysis in analyze-hetero-fleet.py which relies on hashes. Update Rust to export full lists in METRICS or align with telemetry. P3. Tied to project-LICHEN-14hl.
close_reason: Fixed with full sorted lists in METRICS JSON. All reviews now clean.
